news.headline: US Baker Hughes Total Rig Count Actual 590 (Forecast -, Previous 592)

news.summary: PayPal has expanded its cryptocurrency offerings to include Chainlink (LINK) and Solana (SOL), allowing US users to buy, sell, and transfer these tokens. Venmo users will also have access to LINK and SOL in the coming weeks. With approximately 83 million Venmo users and 428 million PayPal accounts globally, PayPal's crypto services are currently exclusive to US residents. This move aligns with increasing consumer demand, according to executive May Zabaneh. PayPal also launched its stablecoin, PayPal USD (PYUSD), in 2023, reaching a market cap of over $1 billion. PYUSD's utility was demonstrated through an invoice settlement with Ernst & Young. Despite its lower circulating supply compared to leading stablecoins, PYUSD has made significant strides in the market. PayPal's involvement in stablecoins has been influential in driving adoption, especially in enterprise environments.
news.headline: PayPal, Venmo to introduce Chainlink, Solana transfers for US customers, reaching 83M Venmo users, 428M global accounts. Expanding crypto services to meet rising demand. PayPal's stablecoin PYUSD surpassed $1B market cap in 2023.
Financial podcast discussing issues related to asset finding and keeping.

news.summary: Dave & Buster’s Entertainment, Inc. will be announcing its Q4 financial results after market close on Monday, April 7. Analysts predict earnings of 71 cents per share for the Texas-based company, a decrease from $1.03 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $550.37 million, down from $599.1 million the previous year. Cory Hatton was recently appointed as the Head of Entertainment Finance, Investor Relations & Treasurer. Following this news, Dave & Buster’s stock dropped by 8.1% to close at $17.00 on Thursday. For more details, readers can find the full story on a related platform.
news.headline: Dave & Buster's (NASDAQ: PLAY) to report Q4 earnings of $0.71 per share, revenue projected at $550.37 million. Shares fell 8.1%.

news.summary: The long-standing difference between the two parties on the issue of speech restrictions is becoming more pronounced under the Trump administration.
news.headline: Europe and the U.S. at odds over free speech, gap widening under Trump administration on restrictions.

The firm stood out in the Technology Industry Sector focusing on Consumer Electronics for its successful campaign with PLAUD.AI's NotePin. 5WPR, known as one of the largest independent PR companies in the U.S., showcased its expertise and innovation in PR strategies through this commendable achievement. This recognition highlights the firm's exceptional work and impact in the industry.
news.headline: 5WPR is a finalist in PRovoke's 2025 SABRE Awards North America for its work in the tech industry with PLAUD.AI's NotePin.

news.summary: Reston, Virginia - Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CHCI), a prominent asset manager, developer, and operator of mixed-use and transit-oriented properties in the Washington, D.C. area, revealed their ongoing collaboration with the Dulles Greenway to organize the 2025 Run The Greenway event on May 4, 2025. This significant occasion marks the fifth consecutive year of the event, aiming to support over 15 local non-profit organizations.
news.headline: Comstock partners with Dulles Greenway for 2025 Run The Greenway on May 4, 2025, benefiting over 15 local non-profits.

news.summary: In Brooklyn, N.Y., HITN, a prominent Spanish-language media outlet for educational and cultural content, revealed that EDYE TV, the linear channel associated with its EDYE preschool streaming platform, has chosen Overon's sophisticated satellite and digital infrastructure for distributing its content in the U.S. and Latin America. EDYE TV utilizes an innovative algorithm-based content distribution system to offer viewers with unexpected programming, reaching audiences across the regions effectively.
news.headline: HITN partners with Overon for content delivery services, powering EDYE TV's linear channel in US and Latin America.

news.summary: Last week, the stock market plummeted to its lowest levels in years following the announcement of higher-than-anticipated Trump tariffs. This resulted in the major indexes experiencing significant losses. Additionally, there was a sharp decline in Treasury yields and crude oil prices. Amidst the market turmoil, Tesla reported a decrease in deliveries. Overall, it was a tumultuous week for investors as they grappled with the impact of the tariffs and other market developments.
news.headline: Stock market plunges on Trump tariffs, Tesla deliveries drop. Indexes see worst weekly losses in years.

news.summary: Semiconductor stocks experienced a sharp decline for the second consecutive day, as investors assessed the consequences of President Donald Trump's tariffs on imports. Among the companies affected, Nvidia saw a significant drop in its stock value. The overall market turmoil caused by the tariffs has raised concerns among investors.
news.headline: Semiconductor stocks plunge for second day due to Trump tariffs, impacting Nvidia stock. Market in chaos.

news.summary: Over the past week, Eli Lilly's stock has declined in line with the overall market, falling below its moving averages. Investors are questioning whether it is advisable to sell LLY stock at this point, considering its recent shift in trajectory amidst broader market concerns.
news.headline: Eli Lilly stock declines with broader market, potentially a sell amid market woes. - Trends down past week.

news.summary: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve Chair, expressed concerns about the tariffs imposed by President Trump being higher than initially anticipated. Powell emphasized the importance of gaining a clearer understanding of the economic situation. Concurrently, the S&P 500 index is experiencing ongoing declines in its value. Despite this, Powell indicated that there is no immediate urgency to reduce interest rates. This update came from Investor's Business Daily's live coverage.
news.headline: Fed Chair Powell is not rushing to cut rates despite S&P 500 dropping; Trump tariffs higher than expected; waiting for more economic clarity.

news.summary: Today, the leading five biotech stocks share noteworthy similarities, including robust ratings and promising performance charts. These stocks are recognized as Tech Leaders in the industry. These top biotech stocks stand out from the majority of stocks in the market, showcasing their strong potential for growth and investment opportunities.
news.headline: Top five biotech stocks stand out with strong ratings and promising charts, surpassing most stocks in the market.

news.summary: The housing market stock index saw an increase of over 1%. Homebuilding stocks made a significant turnaround as a crucial material avoided tariffs.
news.headline: Homebuilding stocks rise over 1% as key material avoids tariffs, boosting investor confidence.

news.summary: The price of oil is predicted to drop significantly, possibly reaching as low as $50, due to Saudi Arabia engaging in a price war. This move could lead to a decrease in gasoline prices, offering a positive outcome amidst President Trump's trade disputes. The post-U.S. oil price has plummeted to a four-year low, prompting Goldman Sachs to lower its outlook on oil.
news.headline: U.S. oil price hits 4-year low, could drop to $50; Gas prices a bright spot amid trade war.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, has launched investigations into various companies for potential violations of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary duties to shareholders. One such company under scrutiny is Maiden Holdings, Ltd. (NASDAQ: MHLD). The investigation by Halper Sadeh LLC will look into any possible wrongdoing that may impact shareholders. Shareholders of Maiden Holdings, Ltd. are advised to stay informed about this investigation for any developments.
news.headline: Investor rights law firm investigating MHLD, SSTK, AMPS for violations; Maiden Holdings, Ltd. targeted.

news.summary: The Chief Executive Officer of OpenAI, Sam Altman, revealed an updated plan for introducing novel AI models due to difficulties in integration and an anticipation of extremely high demand.
news.headline: OpenAI CEO Announces O3 and O4-Mini Release before GPT-5 due to integration issues and high demand.

news.summary: In St. Julians, Malta, on April 4, 2025, it was reported that MJ Foundation Fundacja Rodzinna, a company associated with Mateusz Juroszek, a Board Member and primary insider of Gentoo Media Inc., purchased 28,815 shares in Gentoo Media. The acquisition was made at an average price of SEK 17.10 per share. This transaction marks a significant investment by the company in Gentoo Media.
news.headline: Mateusz Juroszek's company acquired 28,815 shares in Gentoo Media at SEK 17.10/share, becoming a primary insider.

This decision is in alignment with the company's commitment to supporting American consumers, building on their extensive history of Assurance programs. Notably, this move comes after Hyundai's substantial $21 billion investment in the U.S. and the successful grand opening of [specific event/location].
news.headline: Hyundai maintains current MSRP for next two months, starting today until June 2, 2025, following $21 billion U.S. investment.

news.summary: Grayscale has applied to the SEC to launch the Grayscale Solana (SOL) Trust ETF on the NYSE under ticker symbol "GSOL," converting their existing trust into the ETF. Solana has been named as the next digital asset to receive SEC approval following a regulatory shift. Despite US President Trump's announcement of including SOL in the country's first crypto reserve, SOL's price has dropped by 60% from its January all-time high of $295. This decline is attributed to the broader downturn in crypto markets due to trade war fears and Trump administration's policies. Approval of the Solana ETF could help stabilize the price by attracting traditional financial investors and funneling capital from the stock market into the altcoin, potentially making Solana more resilient to market shocks.
news.headline: Grayscale applies for Grayscale Solana Trust ETF in NYSE as GSOL, following SEC filing. Solana dips 60% post-Trump’s crypto reserve announcement. Aiming to boost SOL's stability amid market fears. Interview: Solana predicted as trillion-dollar asset.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Noble Panacea shared the news of the passing of their esteemed founder, Professor Sir Fraser Stoddart. Renowned as a pioneering figure, distinguished Chair Professor, Nobel Laureate Chemist, and the visionary behind Noble Panacea, his legacy will continue to resonate.
news.headline: Noble Panacea appoints Dr. Benjie Limketkai PhD as CTO and board member; mourns founder's passing.

news.summary: A conference call by Lear Corporation is scheduled on May 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. EDT, to discuss the financial performance in the first quarter of 2025. Those interested can join via a webcast link or through toll-free calls.
news.headline: Lear Corp.'s Q1 2025 earnings call scheduled for May 6, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. EDT. Conference details to follow.

news.summary: A former student of Wayne State University, James A. Anderson (BSCE '66, MSCE '70), and his wife Patricia, have generously donated $50 million to the university. This substantial gift aims to boost research, entrepreneurship, and student achievement within the College of Engineering. The donation signifies a significant contribution towards advancing educational opportunities and innovation within the university.
news.headline: Wayne State University receives $50M donation for engineering excellence from alumnus James Anderson and wife Patricia, boosting student success and research.
Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu is mulling DC trip during Passover - Axios.

news.summary: Ripple, the company behind XRP, is raising concerns about the slow crypto regulation in the UK. Cassie Craddock, Ripple's Managing Director for the UK and Europe, mentioned at a London policy summit that British banks are hesitant to engage with digital assets due to regulatory uncertainty. This has led to difficulties in accessing basic banking services for Ripple. Major banks have kept their distance and dismissed Ripple's solutions in the past. While the situation has improved in the EU, where banks are more open to digital assets, the UK environment remains challenging for Ripple's services.
news.headline: Ripple warns that the UK is falling behind in the crypto race, with banks hesitant to adopt Ripple's services due to regulatory uncertainty.

news.summary: In the month of March, there was a decline in tech employment, with key indicators showing a decrease in hiring activity. However, future hiring intentions remained stable despite this trend. The situation was observed in Downers Grove, Illinois on April 4, 2025, as per reports from CompTIA, a prominent global tech service provider. This decline in tech employment indicates challenges in the industry, with uncertainties escalating. The data reflects the complex landscape of the tech job market, where despite the current downward trend, there is a sense of stability in terms of planned future hiring activities.
news.headline: Tech hiring down in March due to uncertainties; CompTIA reports decrease in employment. Future hiring intent remains stable.

news.summary: Thousands of residents in New York participated in a one-day interactive family event at Grand Central Terminal to celebrate National Dandelion Day on April 4, 2025. The event highlighted the popular Dandelion Crayola crayon color and transformed the space into a pop-up experience.
news.headline: Crayola celebrates National Dandelion Day with thousands of guests at Grand Central Terminal in interactive event.
Fed's Barr: AI is overhyped in the short term, but useful longer term.

news.summary: In a recent development, a record-breaking number of 500,000 people have been affected by the ongoing drought in the region. Reports indicate that this has resulted in a significant decrease in crop production, with over 70% of farmland being affected. Additionally, over 200,000 cattle are reportedly facing severe food and water shortages due to the prolonged dry spell. The local authorities are taking emergency measures to provide relief to the affected population by distributing food supplies and organizing water trucking services. The situation remains critical as forecasts suggest that the drought may persist in the coming months.
news.headline: Malware targets Bitcoin Python library, draining wallet funds.

news.summary: Sellers dominated the stock market today in response to China imposing a 34% tariff on all U.S. imported goods. As a result, stocks, oil prices, and yields all plummeted. Companies like Nvidia, Palantir, and Tesla faced significant losses once again in today's trading session.
news.headline: Stocks, oil, and yields plummeted as China imposed a 34% tariff on U.S. imports. Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla hit hard.

news.summary: On Thursday, a survey of shopping carts at Costco indicated minimal concern about the impact of tariffs. The speed at which tariffs are being implemented is matched by their potential removal. A columnist noted no excessive hoarding of goods in response to the uncertain economic climate.
news.headline: Don't panic-buy due to Trump’s tariffs! A Costco survey found little concern. Tariffs may rise and fall quickly. Be cautious.

news.summary: On April 30, 2025, Dr. David Salehani will be hosting a Study Club event at LAVO Restaurant in West Hollywood. The session will include a CE-accredited lecture on 3D printing and digital workflows in dentistry conducted by Dr. Storm Hagen. Attendees can earn 2 Category I CE credits and have the opportunity to engage in networking activities. This exclusive event will provide dinner for all participants as they delve into the modern advancements in dentistry.
news.headline: Dr. Salehani hosts study club with Dr. Hagen on digital dentistry at LAVO Restaurant in West Hollywood on April 30, 2025.

news.summary: Earth's Edge Wellness has recently opened a new location in Laguna Beach, providing a unique combination of in-person and virtual mental health treatments. With a groundbreaking approach blending Western and Eastern practices, they have achieved an impressive 90% success rate in addressing conditions such as anxiety, PTSD, and disordered eating.
news.headline: Earth's Edge Wellness opens new Laguna Beach location, offers hybrid mental health care with 90% success rate.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 4, 2025, an inventor from Hope, Arkansas shared details about the creation of LOCATE MY PET, a new technology aimed at enhancing pet tracking and monitoring. The inventor expressed a desire to increase pet safety and offer pet owners peace of mind by developing this innovative solution. The invention promises to provide precise location information for pets, ensuring better care and security.
news.headline: Inventor in Hope, Ark., creates LOCATE MY PET device for tracking pets, ensuring safety. (CTK-1474) #innovation

The company, a top global producer of off-highway wheels, tires, and assemblies, benefits from this strategic positioning. As of April 4, 2025, Titan continues to uphold its strong presence in the market.

news.summary: In Vilnius, Lithuania, as of April 4, 2025, Chainwire Crypto card users are closely imitating traditional payment behavior. The worldwide market is anticipated to surge to an impressive USD 220.46 billion by 2033. It is projected that by 2026, nearly 20% of cryptocurrency holders - up from the current 14.2% - will utilize their digital assets for transactions.
news.headline: Crypto cards driving blockchain adoption, WhiteBIT Nova users surpass 1 million transactions. Global market target: USD 220.46 billion by 2033. By 2026, 1 in 5 crypto owners expected to use holdings for payments, up from 14.2%.

news.summary: Despite significant token burns, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has decreased by 10% in value over the past week. Shiba Inu is currently priced at $0.00001222 with a market capitalization of $7.2 billion. In the last 24 hours, it saw a 0.8% increase, but over the course of the week, it faced an 8.1% decline. Comparatively, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.1672 with a market cap of $24.9 billion, up 6.2% in the last day but down 6.7% over seven days. Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) is at $0.057041 with a market cap of $2.96 billion, up 7.7% in 24 hours but down 8.5% over the past week. Crypto trader Bicoinmoney identified that SHIB is currently trading within a descending channel constrained by a major downward trendline. For further details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Shiba Inu burns up 1,973% in a day yet SHIB price drops 10% last week; SHIB price $0.00001222, MC $7.2B.
